details.goal: Navigate to https://www.saucedemo.com/, verify the login page loads with the Swag Labs branding, enter username 'standard_user' and password 'secret_sauce' into the respective fields, click the Login button, and verify you are redirected to the inventory page that displays multiple products with the title 'Products' visible at the top. Also verify the shopping cart icon is visible in the top right corner

details.reason: tool=type_text params=map[selector:#user-name value:standard_user] reason=Enter the required username into the username field (next step toward logging in).

tool=type_text params=map[selector:#user-name value:standard_user] reason=Enter the required username into the username input field as the next step toward logging in (selectors confirmed in latest observation).
⚠ LOOP DETECTED: step type_text map[selector:#user-name value:standard_user] repeated. Try a different approach or use finish.

⚠ LOOP DETECTED: step type_text map[selector:#password value:secret_sauce] repeated. Try a different approach or use finish.

⚠ LOOP DETECTED: step type_text map[selector:#password value:secret_sauce] repeated. Try a different approach or use finish.

tool=evaluate params=map[expression:(function(){const u=document.querySelector('#user-name');const p=document.querySelector('#password');const b=document.querySelector('#login-button');if(!u||!p||!b) return {ok:false}; u.value='standard_user'; p.value='secret_sauce'; b.click(); return {ok:true};})()] reason=Avoid repeating type_text (loop detected). Use a single JS evaluation to set username and password using observed selectors and click the Login button.

tool=finish params=map[status:success] reason=The current observe_ui shows Swag Labs branding (div:has-text("Swag Labs")), the page title 'Products' (span:has-text("Products")), and the shopping cart link (a:nth-of-type(1)); the inventory page is displayed, so the goal is achieved.

details.goal: On the SauceDemo inventory page, first verify that at least 6 products are displayed. Then use the sort dropdown to sort products by 'Price (low to high)'. Add the first product (lowest price) to the cart by clicking its 'Add to cart' button, then add the third product to the cart as well. Verify the shopping cart badge shows '2' indicating two items. Take a screenshot of the inventory page showing the added items

details.reason: tool=get_text params=map[selector:#item_5_title_link] reason=Verify that the sixth product is present to confirm at least 6 products are displayed on the inventory page.

details.goal: Click on the shopping cart icon to navigate to the cart page. Verify that exactly 2 items are in the cart with their correct names and prices matching what was added. Verify the total price is displayed. Remove one of the items from the cart by clicking its 'Remove' button. Verify only 1 item remains in the cart and the cart badge count updated. Click the 'Checkout' button to proceed to the checkout information page
